title: My Projects
subtitle: Here are some projects I've worked on, showcasing my skills in web development, database management, and creating modern, high-performing interfaces.
portfolioDescription1: This portfolio was designed to showcase my projects, skills, and background as a web developer.
portfolioDescription2: You will find various web applications I have built, highlighting the technologies I use and my approach to creating efficient, customized solutions.
portfolioDescription3: This site also aims to facilitate contact for collaborations or professional opportunities.
aeutnaSubtitle: An association of students from the University of Tananarive, natives of Antalaha.
aeutnaDescription: This platform allows for managing members, dues, events, meetings, activities, news, and mass messaging.
wofmDescription: A platform dedicated to travel in Madagascar, where visitors can discover authentic tours and easily book their adventure through a clear and user-friendly interface.
technobarDescription: A management platform designed for bars and businesses, offering multi-company mode, allowing each company to manage its own space for products, categories, cash registers, transactions, and alerts.
